rabbitmq: image: 'rabbitmq:4-management-alpine' hostname: 'rabbitmq' ports: - '${FORWARD_RABBITMQ_PORT:-5672}:5672' - '${FORWARD_RABBITMQ_DASHBOARD_PORT:-15672}:15672' environment: RABBITMQ_HOST: "%" RABBITMQ_USER: '${RABBITMQ_USER}' RABBITMQ_PASSWORD: '${RABBITMQ_PASSWORD}' RABBITMQ_VHOST: '${RABBITMQ_VHOST}' RABBITMQ_QUEUE: '${RABBITMQ_QUEUE}' volumes: - 'sail-rabbitmq:/var/lib/rabbitmq' networks: - sail healthcheck: test: ["CMD", "rabbitmq-diagnostics", "-q", "ping"] retries: 3 timeout: 5s
